text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
So I hear you have a suggestion for one<n>of our
posters?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yup! And I just know the groovy cats at<n>this
school are gonna love it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Why not put the Arc de Triomphe in the<n>
background? I bet it'd look super rad!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Quite the idea... I'll have to let the<n>public
relations office know.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
On a more personal note... Maruzensky,<n>may I ask
you a question?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Is "groovy" one of those terms that is<n>fashionable
nowadays?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I am a bit behind the times when it<n>comes to
slang. Could I trouble you to<n>teach me a few
words?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe, no problemo! ☆ When it comes<n>to slang,
I'm your gal!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I can't wait to see the look<n>on Air
Groove and the others' faces.<n>Haha.
